testsuite.name: turbomq.broker.PartitionMigrationTest

testcase.name: advanceMigration transitions through all states to COMPLETED
failed migration does not update partition assignment
advance past COMPLETED is a no-op
createMigration rejects same source and target
createMigration rejects duplicate migration for same partition
generateMigrationPlan produces plans to balance partitions onto new broker
createMigration creates a plan in ADDING_LEARNER state

testsuite.system-out: 09:05:19.459 [Test worker] INFO turbomq.broker.PartitionManager -- Created topic 'orders' with 6 partitions, rf=1 09:05:19.459 [Test worker] INFO turbomq.broker.PartitionMigrationManager -- Created migration plan: partition=Partition-0 Node-1 → Node-3 09:05:19.460 [Test worker] INFO turbomq.broker.PartitionMigrationManager -- Migration advanced: partition=Partition-0 → CATCHING_UP 09:05:19.460 [Test worker] INFO turbomq.broker.PartitionMigrationManager -- Migration advanced: partition=Partition-0 → PROMOTING 09:05:19.460 [Test
